description: Composition Cream kurta with polka dots, made of 100% cotton, has a stylish V-neck, and turquoise green and navy blue print on the yoke, sleeve cuffs and above the vented hem on the front and back Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Inspired by traditional Indian print and crafted in classic cuts, this kurta from vishudh makes for a fab addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The bright print against a toned down base adds zing to this kurta. Team it with leggings or loose pyjamas and heeled slippers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
